title: beadlea oligantha
side_effects: Beadlea oligantha can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and increased heart rate. Ingesting the plant's leaves or flowers can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to the presence of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's essential oils may result in headaches, dizziness, and respiratory issues. Improper use of Beadlea oligantha can also interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure and kidney disease.
